overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neo-Tokyo inspired urban environment. The player character moves along a covered pedestrian walkway with wooden barriers, crosses a multi-lane road with futuristic vehicle traffic, and enters a dark underpass featuring large holographic advertisements and Japanese signage. The scene features warm golden-hour lighting mixed with neon artificial lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with wooden traffic barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian walkway, observing the futuristic traffic on the right

entered.detail: concrete overhead structure with geometric beams creating striped shadows
yellow wooden barriers separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle road
modern glass facade building with reflective windows
multi-lane asphalt road with distinctive red painted curb
large floating holographic advertisement featuring a tiger face with glowing elements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered pedestrian walkway with wooden barriers separating the path from a busy multi-lane road. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the right while the camera moves forward toward distant holographic billboards. The lighting is a mix of warm natural sunlight filtering through the overhead concrete structure and ambient city light.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with large holographic advertisements

events.description: approaching large holographic billboards that dominate the forward view
beginning to turn right toward the road crossing

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the walkway, approaching the intersection and preparing to cross

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera in the opposite direction along the walkway

entered.detail: large vertical holographic display with red background and product imagery
dark tunnel entrance with Japanese characters '天下無双' signage overhead
yellow and black striped construction barriers blocking off area

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to massive holographic billboards floating above the street, transitioning from the covered walkway toward an open intersection. A pedestrian passes by on the left. The underpass entrance with Japanese signage becomes visible in the distance as the camera prepares to cross the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with vehicle traffic and red wall mural

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open sunlit intersection
navigating through moderate futuristic vehicle traffic while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane road, weaving between moving and parked futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large concrete wall with red background and white tree graffiti art
row of parked futuristic vehicles along the red curb

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into a bright sunlit intersection, crossing the asphalt road among futuristic traffic. A prominent red wall with white tree mural appears on the left while various sleek vehicles pass by. The underpass entrance looms ahead as the camera navigates across the lanes.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass with yellow striped crosswalk and large red advertisements

events.description: entering the dark underpass with Japanese '天下無双' signage overhead
crossing the yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk into the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow crosswalk and entering the shadowy underpass area

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and red text markings
twin large red billboards displaying 'DO YOU FEEL THE RUSH?' with product imagery
shadowy concrete underpass with overhead lighting strips and structural pillars
vertical traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a bold yellow striped crosswalk and enters a dark underpass with artificial lighting. Large red billboards with 'DO YOU FEEL THE RUSH?' text dominate the left wall while the '天下無双' signage hangs overhead. The environment shifts from bright natural light to shadowy artificial illumination as the camera moves deeper into the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched pedestrian walkway into the shadowy depths of a neon-lit urban underpass. It begins along a covered path with wooden barriers, moving forward as warm natural sunlight filters through concrete structures and futuristic vehicles stream past. As the camera approaches massive floating holographic billboards, the scene opens into a bright intersection where the viewer crosses an asphalt road past a red wall featuring a white tree mural. The movement then leads across a bold yellow striped crosswalk, transitioning abruptly from the brilliant daylight into a dark underpass. Finally, the environment shifts to shadowy artificial illumination, dominated by large red billboards and overhead Japanese signage as the camera moves deeper into the tunnel.
